title: Build an app from your phone in AI Studio
summary: Google AI Studio is a browser-based platform that lets users build custom apps directly from mobile devices using voice commands. The tutorial shows building an image-generation app without installing software, using Gemini to generate code in real time and the Nano Banana API for image functionality.
writeup: This tutorial from Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building a custom app entirely from a mobile device in Google AI Studio, a browser-based platform that requires no software installation. The build uses voice commands, with Gemini generating code in real time, and integrates the Nano Banana API to add image-generation functionality. The result is a working image-generation app assembled directly from a phone.
